steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: To accomplish the goal of emphasizing the order in which the two keepers began their careers, the choice must directly show the chronological relationship—which keeper started first and which started second.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly establishes this order
steps.content:
C explicitly states “Flora McNeil began her career as a lighthouse keeper years after Maria Younghans did,” showing that Maria started first (1867) and Flora started later (1904).

The other three choices either mention both keepers without establishing when they started relative to each other (A, B), or compare when their careers ended rather than when they began (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
